summary.reportPurpose: Lock the current renderer as the reference family before later compact-mode comparison beads add candidate runs.

cases.currentRendererStrength: Maximum visibility into repeated gate output and failing command details.
cases.currentRendererRisk: Highest prompt churn because every rerun tends to restate large validation transcripts.

cases.currentRendererStrength: Preserves the full multi-turn thread for continuity across partial fixes.
cases.currentRendererRisk: Long sequential flows can accumulate non-decisive history and increase context volume turn over turn.

cases.currentRendererStrength: Keeps late-arriving clues visible without summary loss.
cases.currentRendererRisk: Verbose output can dominate the prompt budget and obscure the next action in review.

cases.currentRendererStrength: Uses the current full-history path as the safest reference for interrupted run recovery.
cases.currentRendererRisk: Recovery turns can inherit large checkpoint and prior-output payloads with no compact-mode filtering.

remainingWork: Collect telemetry-backed current-renderer measurements once the render byte and timing signals are wired end to end.
Add compact-mode candidate reports against these same fixture ids in the later comparison beads.
Publish a comparison summary note under docs/evaluation once wins, losses, ties, and regressions can be inspected.
